context: External stabilization session for agents-lab 0.8 readiness. The board is release-clear: no open P0, no in-progress tasks, no blocked tasks. The remaining v0.8.0 readiness blocker is deliberate versioning only: packages are still 0.7.0, so target-version-ready stays false until the operator explicitly chooses the bump/tag/release lane. Recent work tightened package runtime dependency boundaries, clarified stale colony readiness history, and added a docs contract that ties the public 0.8 readiness map to the canonical release-readiness report.
next_actions: Do not bump/tag/publish v0.8.0 without explicit operator release decision.
Before any long Pi runtime, re-run pi:dev:pressure or the equivalent runtime pressure gate in the current environment.
Keep the four remaining planned external-influence tasks parked unless the operator explicitly selects a research lane.
Prefer local-safe slices that improve packaging, docs contracts, engine boundaries, or runtime pressure observability.
blockers: target-version-ready: false by design until packages are intentionally bumped from 0.7.0 to 0.8.0
